name: Rahul Sharma
review: Wholeup completely transformed our Meta Ads strategy. Sales grew by over 200% last quarter alone — genuinely impressed by their data-driven approach.

name: Ayesha Khan
review: Our YouTube channel was completely stagnant. Their thumbnail strategy and video SEO took our views from 50K to 600K in just 3 months.

name: Suresh Patel
review: Their SEO team is exceptional. Our top 5 keywords now rank on Google's first page — without any paid ads. Organic traffic is up 340%.

name: Priya Rao
review: The UI/UX and web development work is absolutely world-class. Our website now gets compliments from every client we show it to.

name: Amit Verma
review: Wholeup scaled our YouTube channel from 30K to 116K subscribers in 6 months. Their content strategy is unlike anything we'd seen before.

name: Sarah Mitchell
review: Brilliant agency with a very professional team. Our Google Ads ROAS went from 1.8x to 5.1x in just 8 weeks. Outstanding results.

name: James Carter
review: Finally an agency that actually delivers. Our Instagram grew 3x and their reel strategy drove over 2M organic views in two months.

name: Neha Joshi
review: Top-tier in every way. From strategy to execution, everything is handled with professionalism and measurable outcomes. Highly recommend.
